zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Ludlow於1360年出生在英國史洛普爾霍德特時，他的父親John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay35歲，母親Lady Joan de Sibbeton28歲。他於1390年與Isabel Lingen在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1398年7月20日在英國史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾德雷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Ludlow于1360年出生在英国史洛普爾霍德特时，他的父亲John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay35岁，母亲Lady Joan de Sibbeton28岁。他于1390年与Isabel Lingen在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1398年7月20日在英国史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ludlow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from a place in Shropshire, so named from the Old English river name Hlūde (from hlūd ‘loud, roaring’) referring to the Teme river + hlāw ‘hill’. This name was taken Ireland in the 13th and 17th centuries. See also Laidlaw .

variants.name: Laidlaw
meanings: Scottish: Border surname found mainly around Selkirk and the vales of Ettrick and Yarrow; a Scottish development of   Ludlow  .

variants.name: Ledlow
meanings: English, Irish, or Scottish: variant of   Ludlow   or   Laidlaw  .

variants.name: Ludlam
meanings: English: possibly from a misreading of w as m in Ludelawe, a recorded medieval spelling of the placename Ludlow in Shropshire. Compare Ludlow .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Ludlow was born in 1360, in Hodnet, Shropshire, England, his father, John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay, was 35 and his mother, Lady Joan de Sibbeton, was 28. He married Isabel Lingen in 1390, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 20 July 1398, in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Ludlow est né en 1360, à Hodnet, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan de Sibbeton, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Lingen en 1390, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 juillet 1398, à Market Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Ludlow 1360 in Hodnet, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay 35 und seine Mutter Lady Joan de Sibbeton 28. Er hat 1390 in Shropshire, England Isabel Lingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Juli 1398 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England und wurde in Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Ludlow è nato il nel 1360 nel Hodnet, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan de Sibbeton, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Lingen nel 1390, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 luglio 1398, nel Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Drayton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Ludlowが1360年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアホードネットで生まれた時，父John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesayは35歳，母Lady Joan de Sibbetonは28歳であった。1390年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでIsabel Lingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1398年7月20日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアマーケト ドレイトンで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Ludlow(이)가 1360년 영국 슈럽실르 호드넷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan de Sibbeton(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1390년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Isabel Lingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1398년 7월 20일 영국 슈럽실르 마크트 드라이턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Ludlow nasceu em 1360, em Hodnet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan de Sibbeton, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Lingen em 1390, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de julho de 1398, em Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Ludlow родился в 1360 г. в местности ходнет, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Ludlow, I, Lord of Stokesay было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan de Sibbeton, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Lingen в 1390 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 июля 1398 г. в местности маркет дреитон, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности дреитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Isabel Lingen en 1390, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1398, en Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
